task_completion.description: A chart window is open in NinjaTrader 8
task_completion.visual_evidence: A NinjaTrader 8 chart window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Only one chart window is open
task_completion.visual_evidence: There is exactly one chart window visible, rather than multiple separate chart windows.

task_completion.description: The chart window contains exactly three tabs
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart window has a tabbed interface (usually at the bottom) showing exactly three distinct tabs.

task_completion.description: The tabs are for SPY, AAPL, and MSFT
task_completion.visual_evidence: The labels on the three tabs correspond to the instruments SPY, AAPL, and MSFT.

task_completion.description: The chart timeframe is set to Daily
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active chart's header or title indicates a Daily timeframe (e.g., '1 Day', 'Daily', or 'D').

task_completion.description: The workspace is saved to disk
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence of saving the workspace, such as the 'Save Workspace' menu action being clicked, a save dialog, or the Control Center showing the workspace name without an unsaved indicator (like an asterisk).

integrity.description: The agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to create the charts
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with NinjaTrader menus, dialogs, and chart windows, rather than a text editor modifying workspace XML files.

integrity.description: The application used is genuinely NinjaTrader 8
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches NinjaTrader 8 (Control Center, specific chart window styling) and not a different trading platform or mock-up.

integrity.description: The charts display actual market data
integrity.visual_evidence: The active chart shows rendered candlesticks or bars, indicating the instrument data was successfully loaded and not just an empty chart.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly one chart window containing exactly three tabs (SPY, AAPL, MSFT). The timeframe must be Daily (often denoted as '1 Day' or 'D' in NinjaTrader). The instruments use real financial data from 2023-2024. Ensure that multiple separate chart windows were not created instead of tabs. The workspace must be saved at the end.
